attributes.content:
## Overview

The Portfolio card gives the workspace a structured home for collection of market positions with total value, allocation breakdown, and performance metrics.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Portfolio acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Invoice]]** -- Invoice can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Portfolio.
- **[[Order]]** -- Order can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Portfolio.
- **[[Deal]]** -- Deal can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Portfolio.
- **[[Report]]** -- Portfolio can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Metrics (KPI)]]** -- Metrics (KPI) can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Portfolio.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Portfolio can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Portfolio as the structured home for collection of market positions with total value, allocation breakdown, and performance metrics and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Portfolio when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Portfolio stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
